modules.summary: Provides the site's primary search widget allowing visitors to enter service-specific search criteria for Hotels, Flights, Tours, or Cars and initiate searches that lead to result listings.
modules.where_it_fits: Located on the Home page reachable from the top navigation (Home), this module is the entry point for initiating searches across Hotels, Flights, Tours, and Cars and hands off to the corresponding results/listing pages (Hotels Search & Listing, Flights Search & Listing, Tours Search & Listing, Cars Search & Listing).
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is on the Home page (authentication not required) with the desired service tab selected and ready to provide required search inputs.

modules.summary: Collects personal and contact information to create a new user account with validation and optional email verification.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the Home page top navigation under Account/Login and used before accessing account-restricted areas like the User Dashboard and Booking Management; it is part of the onboarding flow that transitions anonymous visitors into authenticated users. The main navigation remains available while contextual menus update after successful registration and login.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Visitor is not authenticated and has access to the Home or Account/Login page

modules.summary: A page that authenticates users via email/password (with optional social logins), handles remember-me and CAPTCHA on repeated failures, and redirects authenticated users to their dashboard or previously requested page.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Account/Login or when a user attempts to access protected areas (e.g., Dashboard, Booking Management) and is not authenticated; it is part of the authentication flow that transitions visitors from the public Home/Search area into their personalized User Dashboard and account-managed sections.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is not authenticated and has access to the Login page (via Account/Login or redirect from a protected resource); valid email/password credentials may exist for the user.

modules.summary: Allows an unauthenticated user to request a password reset by submitting their account email so a time-limited reset link is sent.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation's Account/Login path, this module is part of the authentication flow tied to Login/Signup and precedes the Password Reset page reached via the emailed link; it sits outside booking flows and is used to regain account access before reaching the User Dashboard or booking management.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Unauthenticated user attempting account recovery who knows (or enters) the registered email address.

modules.summary: Collects hotel search criteria and presents a filterable, sortable listing of hotel result cards showing name, location, rating, thumbnail, starting price, amenities, and a Book Now action.
modules.where_it_fits: Reached from the Home page search widget (Hotels tab) or the top navigation Hotels link, this module is the search-results stage that follows submission of hotel search criteria and precedes individual Hotel Details & Booking and the subsequent payment flow.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Search parameters entered (destination, check-in/check-out dates, number of rooms, and guest counts) and the user is in the Hotels search flow (guest or authenticated) with currency/language set.

modules.summary: Displays comprehensive hotel information (photos, description, map), room options with pricing and policies, guest reviews, and a booking form that captures guest details and price breakdown prior to payment.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the main navigation via Home -> Hotels or Hotels Search & Listing, this module is the detailed property view users reach after searching for hotels and selecting a result; it precedes Payment Processing and Booking Management in the booking lifecycle.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User has performed a hotel search and selected a specific hotel and stay dates (guest count and room selection available); booking completion requires an authenticated (logged-in) user.

modules.summary: Collects flight search criteria and displays a sortable, filterable list of matching flight options with fares, schedules, stops, and expandable details like baggage and fare rules.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the site's top navigation under Flights and via the Flights tab of the home page search widget, this module is the discovery layer that sits between the global search entry point and the Flight Booking flow. It connects user-provided search criteria to selectable flight results and passes the chosen option into the booking/payment lifecycle.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Visitor is on the site (logged in or guest) and has valid flight search inputs provided (trip type, origin/destination, dates, passenger counts, cabin class).

modules.summary: Displays the selected flight itinerary, passenger and cabin details with a fare breakdown, and collects validated traveler and lead contact information required for completing the booking.
modules.where_it_fits: This module is part of the Flights section and is reached after Flights Search & Listing/Flight Booking in the main navigation; it constitutes the final booking information step that precedes Payment Processing in the booking lifecycle.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific flight itinerary and passenger count have been selected (user may be logged in or proceeding as guest) and the booking flow has advanced from Flights Search & Listing.

modules.summary: Provides search and listing of available tours with filters, sorting, and result cards that display images, destination, duration, starting price, availability, and traveler ratings.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under Tours or via the home page search widget's Tours tab, this module follows the initial search entry point and precedes the Tour Details & Booking flow. It serves as the discovery layer that narrows options and presents selectable tour results for booking or deeper inspection.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Visitor is in the Tours section (via top nav or home search) with valid search criteria entered (e.g., destination and travel dates); user may be guest or authenticated.

modules.summary: Presents full tour information (images, day-by-day itinerary, inclusions/exclusions, departure dates, per-person pricing, map, reviews, and terms) and captures traveler and contact details to calculate the total cost and create a booking.
modules.where_it_fits: Reached from the Top Nav → Tours or the Home search widget via Tours Search & Listing, this module is the detailed product page and booking entry point that precedes Payment Processing and Booking Management in the reservation flow.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific tour has been selected from Tours Search & Listing; if not authenticated, the user will be redirected to Login before completing a booking.

modules.summary: Provides car rental search and dynamic listing of available vehicles by category with detailed specs, pricing, and sidebar filters.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the main navigation under the Cars section or via the home page search widget's Cars tab, this module handles the search input and presents matching car listings as part of the booking flow before Car Booking and Payment Processing. It sits alongside other transport modules (Flights, Tours) and links into Booking Management and User Dashboard for completed reservations.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User (guest or authenticated) has accessed the Cars section and supplied or selected car rental search criteria (pick-up/drop-off locations and dates/times); no prior booking required.

modules.summary: Displays the selected vehicle, rental period, pick-up/drop-off details, pricing breakdown, driver information form, optional add-ons and insurance selection, and a terms acceptance step before proceeding to payment.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the main navigation under Cars and from the home page search widget's Cars tab, this module follows Cars Search & Listing and precedes Payment Processing and Booking Management/User Dashboard in the booking lifecycle. It is the confirmation and data-collection step where selected vehicle and rental options are finalized before payment.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A specific car has been chosen from Cars Search & Listing and rental dates, pick-up/drop-off locations and times are specified; user is on the booking page ready to provide driver and contact details.

modules.summary: Provides country-specific visa requirements and a visa application workflow including form entry, document uploads, fee details, and status tracking.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation under the Visa section alongside Hotels/Flights/Tours/Cars, this module is part of the booking-related services and ties into the User Dashboard where submitted visa applications appear in the bookings section for tracking.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is authenticated (logged in) and has access to their Dashboard; nationality and destination country are known or selectable.

modules.summary: A personalized account area that aggregates bookings, profile details, wallet/credits, wishlist, reviews, settings, and logout functionality.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation Account/Login after successful authentication, the dashboard serves as the authenticated user's landing area for booking history and account management while the main navigation remains available across pages.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Authenticated (logged-in) user session with an existing user account.

modules.summary: Shows detailed information for an individual booking including confirmation number, service and traveler details, payment information, current status, and available modify or cancel actions when allowed.
modules.where_it_fits: Located within the User Dashboard/Booking Management area that is accessible after authentication via Account/Login; it is reached from the dashboard booking history or profile account links while the main navigation remains available (Home, Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars, Visa, Offers, Blog, Account/Login).
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Authenticated user with at least one existing booking (a specific booking selected or accessed from booking history)

modules.summary: Processes customer payments for completed bookings by presenting a detailed price breakdown, collecting payment details across multiple methods, and handling success or failure outcomes.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from booking flows initiated via the Home search widget or section-specific flows (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) after selecting items and proceeding to book; it sits between the booking review stage and the booking confirmation page in the checkout lifecycle. The main navigation (Home, Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) leads users into searches and listings that ultimately route to this Payment Processing module when a reservation is being finalized.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A completed booking/reservation with traveler details and total price is present; payment intent is initiated and the user is authenticated or has provided guest booking information.

modules.summary: Provides site-wide currency and language preferences that update prices and interface text in real-time and persist to the user profile or session/cookies.
modules.where_it_fits: Presented in the top navigation bar as currency and language selectors and available across all primary sections (Home, Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars, Offers, Blog, Account), affecting search widgets, listings, details, booking flows and the user dashboard. Selections take effect immediately across the site and are applied for the duration of the session or saved to the authenticated user's profile.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is browsing the site with an active session on any page; if authenticated, the user account is available for preference persistence, otherwise session/cookies are available to store preferences.

modules.summary: Provides dynamic filtering and sorting controls for listing results across Hotels, Flights, Tours, and Cars, summarizing active filters and updating results in real time.
modules.where_it_fits: This module is part of the listing pages reached from the top navigation (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) and the home page search widget; it operates on Search & Listing pages before users view item details or proceed to booking. It sits between initial search results (Home Page & Search / Search results) and the detail/booking flows (Hotel Details & Booking, Flight Booking, Tour Details & Booking, Car Booking).
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: A search query has been executed and a listing results page is displayed with results loaded.

modules.summary: Presents aggregated scores and individual guest reviews with category-specific ratings, filters, and photo attachments, and supports post-stay review submissions by eligible users.
modules.where_it_fits: Appears on listing pages and item detail pages accessed from the main navigation (Home → Hotels/Flights/Tours/Cars) and integrates with the User Dashboard and post-stay email workflow; it is part of the post-booking feedback and discovery experience used to inform future bookings. It complements search/listing content by providing social proof and detailed guest feedback within the booking lifecycle.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Viewing: a listing or detail page exists (with review data available); Submitting: user is authenticated and has a completed booking eligible for review.

modules.summary: Displays promotional banners and featured deal cards across Hotels, Flights, and Packages with filtering, validity details, and Book Now actions that apply discounts or pre-fill searches.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation (Offers) and reachable from the home page or promotional links, this module sits alongside core search/listing sections (Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars) to surface time-limited promotions and drive bookings. It connects into the booking flow and payment processing by applying promo codes or redirecting to pre-filled searches with discounted rates.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Application loaded with main navigation available and the user has selected the Offers section (visitor or authenticated user); booking and payment subsystems are available for applying discounts.

modules.summary: Ends the current authenticated user session, clears sensitive session data, and returns the user to the home page.
modules.where_it_fits: Available from the top navigation Account/Login area and within the User Dashboard, this module is part of the account management lifecycle used when an authenticated user signs out; after logout, attempts to access protected pages route to the Login page.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: An active authenticated user session exists (user is logged in).
